content.en:
At this time, the Qingyuan Saint Realm had already attracted the prying eyes of the strong.

They were all watching the excitement one after another, and there was even no lack of superior domain ancestors watching the excitement.

It was also at this time that the Jinchen Holy Ancestor fled.

"The Invincible Domain Ancestor fled, the Jinchen Saint Ancestor is simply a shame among the Peerless Domain Ancestors, and he was beaten by the Invincible Domain Ancestor to run away!"

"I don't know if the Jinchen Holy Ancestor can escape, if he can't escape, I'm afraid that he is the first peerless Domain Ancestor in the Dark Sacred Domain to be killed by the Invincible Domain Ancestor, and he can definitely be famous in the Dark Sacred Domain!"

"I estimate that the Jinchen Holy Ancestor can't escape, the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor is an ancestor skill of speed, how can the Jinchen Holy Ancestor escape?"

......

"Want to escape?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"Five Elements Ban!"

As soon as Ye Tian made a move, he directly blocked the void.

Today's Five Elements Prohibition is no longer a holy skill, but an ancestral skill.

Under the ban of the Five Elements of the Ancestral Technique, this piece of void was directly blocked, as if the origin of the Great Dao was isolated, no matter how terrifying the Jinchen Holy Ancestor was to escape for himself, there was no way to break the ban on the Five Elements.

Thundered!!!!

Jinchen Holy Ancestor frantically broke through time and space, trying to escape, but unfortunately it was useless, he couldn't escape.

"False Slash!"

The terrifying Space Ancestor Technique attacked, shattering the layers of Jinchen Saint Ancestor's defenses, and shattering one side of his body.

Recovered again and again, shattered again and again.

As time passed, the Jinchen Holy Ancestor's injuries became more and more serious.

Half an hour later, the Jinchen Saint Ancestor found that his Supreme Domain Body had been worn out by seventy percent, which was already in a state of serious injury and dying.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, spare me!"

Jinchen Saint Ancestor panicked.

He doesn't want to fall, he is a levelless domain ancestor, with an endless lifespan, and the domain realm will be destroyed one day, but as a levelless domain ancestor, he is almost immortal.

Therefore, he naturally did not want to die!

However, Ye Tian ignored the Jinchen Saint Ancestor at all and continued to attack the Jinchen Saint Ancestor.

After another moment, the Supreme Domain of the Golden Saint Ancestor completely collapsed.

And the soul of the Jinchen Holy Ancestor was also annihilated.

At this point, a peerless domain ancestor has fallen!

With the fall of the Jinchen Holy Ancestor, the endless territory of the Qingyuan Domain was in the same sorrow, and the blood rain did not stop.

After killing the Jinchen Holy Ancestor, Ye Tian stepped into the Qingyuan Holy Realm and destroyed the headquarters of the Qingyuan Holy Land.

At this point, the Qingyuan Holy Land was removed.

......

Soon, Ye Tian single-handedly killed a Peerless Domain Ancestor and destroyed the news of the Qingyuan Holy Land spread throughout the Dark Holy Land.

Battle Gate.

When the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors, Ancient Sea Ancestors and others learned of this time, they were immediately dumbfounded.

"What, the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor killed a Superiority Domain Ancestor ????"

The Ancient Sea Ancestor was stunned.

He thought it wasn't a long time ago, billions of years ago, and this time was just a retreat time for him.

Ye Tian, the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain, who was very weak at the beginning and needed his help, now surpassed him, and even killed a peerless domain ancestor, far above him.

"Invincible Domain Ancestor slashes Superior Domain Ancestor, how can this be done?"

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestors were also stunned.

He condensed the half-step ancestral body and comprehended the ancestral technique, which can be described as incomparably demonic, and to a certain extent, even more demonic than some peerless domain ancestors.

In terms of actual combat effectiveness, he could at most learn one or two moves from the weakest newly promoted Peerless Domain Ancestor, and if he really fought each other, he couldn't beat the other party.

And the Jinchen Holy Ancestor of the Qingyuan Holy Land is in the middle stage of the Superior Domain Ancestor, and it is said that he was injured, but now the injury is estimated to have almost recovered.

Ye Tian was able to kill Jinchen Holy Ancestor, I am afraid that he could be pinched to death with his hands!

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, terrifying!"

The Five Thunder Domain Ancestor sighed.

Ye Tian didn't know what other Invincible Domain Ancestors thought of him, and at this moment, he returned to the Dao Mountain Realm Xuanxu Saint Realm.

After Ye Tian came back, he came to the Battle Realm Tower with doubts and saw the Fire Emblem War Ancestor.

"Fire Emblem War Ancestor, I have something to ask you!"

Ye Tian said very seriously.

"Oh, what's the matter?" asked the Fire Emblem War Ancestor.

"Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, when I was fighting with Jinchen Holy Ancestor, he sacrificed something and injured me, if it weren't for the Immortal Ancestor Technique, I'm afraid I would have been hit hard!"

Ye Tian described the piece of paper or the spell, especially the phantom that was completely described, and even transformed it for the Fire Emblem War Ancestor to see.

At this time, Ye Tian found that the expression of the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor was very solemn.

"Ye Tian, about that phantom, it is actually the Dark Sacred Domain, no, it should be said that a big secret of the Dark Forbidden Domain, even bigger than the secret of the Dark Destruction Domain, basically only the Superior Domain Ancestor is qualified to know, and the order is not allowed to be revealed. Now that you have killed the Jinchen Holy Ancestor, you are also qualified to know this secret!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor said seriously.

"What's the secret?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor said: "You should have heard that Jinchen Holy Ancestor was injured and has been healing. Although the Jinchen Saint Ancestor had a home advantage in the Qingyuan Saint Realm and could exert stronger strength, in fact, the Saint Realm did not have much increase in the Peerless Domain Ancestor, and those formations in the Holy Land would not be of much help, otherwise, the Jinchen Domain Ancestor would have fled into the Qingyuan Saint Realm a long time ago. It is rumored from the outside world that the Qingyuan Holy Ancestor is avoiding the hostile Superior Domain Ancestor and does not dare to leave the Qingyuan Holy Realm. But there is really such a hostile and peerless domain ancestor, and the Qingyuan Saint Realm can't stop the other party, people have already killed it!"

"yes, that's not normal!"

Ye Tian thought of this question at this time.

For example, with his strength, the Xuanxu Saint Realm has no increase in him.

But the ordinary domain ancestor didn't know at all, and thought that the Holy Realm also had a great increase in the non-superior domain ancestor, so the rumor from the outside world was not realistic at all.

"Then how did the Jinchen Holy Ancestor get hit hard?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It was the kind of terrible existence you described that was so hard hit that I had to return to the Qingyuan Saint Realm to heal. He probably sealed the aura of that terrifying existence and used it, I have to say that Jinchen Saint Ancestor is also a genius!"

"What the hell is that?"

Ye Tian was too curious.

"Annihilation!"

Fire Emblem War Ancestor said, his eyes still revealing fear.

Being able to terrify the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor shows how terrifying this so-called Silent Annihilation Clan is!
